summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the updated Orders module with 11 specific changes. All 14 features tested successfully. The Orders page implements: customer masking, Order Status column, fixed filters (no duplicate, SKU populated, specific date option), 3 modals (Assign Courier, Print Invoice, Schedule Pickup), Ready to Ship card view, and status-aware footer without Import button.
passed_tests: 1. Customer details masked (phone: 98****10, address: 122003, ***) on Pending tab
2. Customer details masked on Accepted tab
3. Customer details masked on Packed tab
4. Order Status column visible in table header with Paid/COD badges
5. Shipping filter shows: All methods, Self ship, Easy ship (no duplicate)
6. Date filter shows: Till date, Today, Yesterday, Last 7 days, Last 30 days, Select specific date
7. Date picker input appears when 'Select specific date' is chosen
8. SKU filter populated with actual values: Shoes & Handbags, Electronics, Apparel, Kitchen
9. Pending tab footer: Export, Cancel order, Schedule pickup, Assign courier (NO Import)
10. Accepted tab footer: Export, Cancel order, Schedule pickup, Assign courier (NO Import)
11. Packed tab footer: Print labels, Create manifest (NO Import, NO Export)
12. Ready to Ship tab shows card layout with 2 fulfillment groups
13. Ready to Ship card 0: Self ship 12 packages with Print & close manifest, View packages buttons
14. Ready to Ship card 1: Easy ship 10 packages with buttons
15. Ready to Ship tab has NO footer action bar
16. Assign Courier modal opens with: product info, pickup date, courier dropdown (Delhivery, BlueDart, DTDC etc), courier service dropdown (Standard, Express), Assign courier CTA
17. Print Invoice modal opens with: order list, product info, marketplace logos, order IDs, Print labels CTA
18. Schedule Pickup modal opens with: package details, pickup date/time, shipping fee (Rs.70), Schedule pickup CTA
19. In-Transit tab shows regular table view (not card)
20. In-Transit tab has footer action bar
critical_code_review_comments: OrdersPage.tsx is ~1500 lines - well-structured with separate components
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Customer masking implemented correctly via maskPhone() and maskAddress() helpers
shouldMaskCustomer() correctly returns true for pending, accepted, packed, new statuses
Footer ActionBar correctly renders different buttons based on status
Ready to Ship view uses card layout as expected
seed_data_creation: All data MOCKED using generateMockOrders() function - generates orders across 6 marketplaces (Amazon, Flipkart, Coupang, Snapdeal, Meesho, Myntra)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orders module fully tested with 11 new changes. Key data-testids: orders-page, status-tab-{status}, shipping-filter, date-filter, sku-filter, specific-date-input, action-bar, action-schedule-pickup, action-assign-courier, action-print-labels, action-create-manifest, assign-courier-modal, print-invoice-modal, order-modal, ready-to-ship-view, rts-card-0, rts-card-1. All filters working, modals functional, status-aware footer implemented correctly.

mocked_api_info.details: Entire app is UI-only. All order data is generated by generateMockOrders() function in OrdersPage.tsx. No backend APIs - all data is in-memory mock data.
